fix_plan: Add 8 new obstacles to the ER room in roomData.json to create density and medical atmosphere: 3 curtain_partition obstacles (1x3 vertical) between patient bays to create semi-private treatment areas, medical props (2 iv_stands, 1 vital_monitor, 1 crash_cart) scattered near patient bays and gurneys, and 1 triage_desk (3x1) near the room entrance. All placements verified against existing NPCs, zones, items, doors, spawn point, and obstacles to avoid collisions.
diff_summary: Added 8 obstacle entries to ER room: 3 curtain_partition (6,2 / 13,2 / 6,9), 2 iv_stand (5,5 / 1,10), 1 vital_monitor (18,5), 1 crash_cart (13,10), 1 triage_desk (8,13)
notes: Curtain partitions divide the room into zones between patient bays. Medical props add visual density near treatment areas. Triage desk at y=13 creates a natural entry flow from spawn point at (10,12). All 8 new obstacles verified collision-free with existing entities.

fix_plan: Redesign reception room obstacles to create functional zones: L-shaped reception counter (upper third), privacy screens as sight-line breaks between desk and waiting area, grouped waiting chairs with magazine_rack and tissue_box props, and water_dispenser + notice_board near entrance. All NPC, zone, item, and door positions unchanged.
diff_summary: Replaced 11 symmetric obstacles with 19 zone-based obstacles: L-shaped counter with filing cabinets, 2 privacy_screens at y=6, grouped waiting chairs (left cluster + right pair), magazine_rack, tissue_box, water_dispenser, notice_board near entrance, smaller corner plants
notes: Layout creates three distinct zones: reception counter area (y=1-4), privacy buffer (y=6), and waiting area (y=8-12). Privacy screens between desk and waiting area double as visual storytelling. Entrance props (water dispenser, notice board) at y=12 near spawn. All positions verified collision-free with NPCs, zones, items, doors, and spawn point.

fix_plan: Reorganize IT Office obstacles to create a tech workspace feel. Server racks form continuous back wall (y=1-2) with gap for educational item. Add monitor_bank rows at y=6, cable_tray along walls, whiteboard_wall near breach_playbook, locked_cabinet in corner, and desk props (coffee_mug, headphones) for personality. All NPC, zone, item, door positions unchanged.
diff_summary: Replaced 4 tall server_racks (2x4 each) with 4 wide server_racks (3-4x2) forming back wall. Added 2 monitor_bank, 4 cable_tray, 1 whiteboard_wall, 1 locked_cabinet, 1 coffee_mug, 1 headphones. Kept workstation_cluster, monitoring_desk, printer_station unchanged.
notes: Server wall at y=1-2 spans most of room width with gap at x=9-11 for security_safeguards item. Monitor banks at y=6 create SOC workstation rows flanking central cluster. Whiteboard at (3,9) near breach_playbook zone. Locked cabinet at (17,12) in lower-right corner. Cable trays along walls add infrastructure detail. Coffee mug and headphones humanize the workspace. BFS pathfinding verified from spawn to all NPCs, zones, items, and doors.

fix_plan: Reorganize records_room filing cabinets into parallel aisle rows (x=3/5 left, x=14/16 right) with middle columns (x=8,x=12). Add records_counter (4x1) at y=1, inbox_tray and outbox_tray flanking it, archive_box near shredder, and document_cart in aisle for paper-heavy density.
diff_summary: Changes were already included in DESIGN-005 commit (3900d20). Records room has: 6 filing cabinets in aisle formation, records_counter, inbox/outbox trays, archive_box, document_cart. All collision-free with NPCs, zones, items, doors, spawn.
notes: DESIGN-006 changes were accidentally bundled into the DESIGN-005 commit (3900d20). The records_room already has all target obstacles: filing cabinet aisles (left x=3/5, right x=14/16, middle x=8/12), records_counter at y=1, inbox/outbox trays at y=2, archive_box at (2,13) near shredder, document_cart at (6,5) in the aisle. No additional commit needed.
